user.title: Blockheat entities
user.description: Map external inputs and writable outputs. Legacy helper/boolean mappings are internal-only. Read-only internal state entities: binary_sensor.blockheat_energy_saving_active, sensor.blockheat_target_saving, sensor.blockheat_target_comfort, sensor.blockheat_target_final.

data.control_number_entity: Control output - Writable control number entity
data.daikin_outdoor_temp_sensor: Optional consumer - Daikin outdoor temperature sensor

data_description.nordpool_price: Current price sensor with optional `today` attribute for slot ranking.
data_description.storage_room_sensor: Storage tank or storage room temperature sensor.
data_description.outdoor_temperature_sensor: Outdoor temperature input used by saving and boost logic.
data_description.control_number_entity: Numeric control endpoint Blockheat writes final target values to.
data_description.pv_sensor: Optional PV power sensor used to suppress blocking when production is high.
data_description.enable_daikin_consumer: Enable optional Daikin consumer writes in tuning and runtime.
data_description.daikin_climate_entity: Target Daikin climate entity for optional consumer writes.
data_description.daikin_outdoor_temp_sensor: Optional outdoor sensor for Daikin cold-weather guard.

tuning_policy.title: Tuning: Policy window
tuning_policy.description: Configure expensive-slot policy and policy safety guards.

data.price_ignore_below: Skip blocking when price is below (SEK/kWh)
data.pv_ignore_above_w: Skip blocking when PV is at/above (W)

data_description.minutes_to_block: Daily total minutes considered expensive and routed to saving mode (top-N 15-minute slots).
data_description.price_ignore_below: If current price is below this value, policy is forced OFF even if the slot is in top-N.
data_description.pv_ignore_above_w: If current PV production is at or above this value, policy is forced OFF even if the slot is in top-N.
data_description.min_toggle_interval_min: Debounce interval that enforces a minimum time between policy ON/OFF transitions.

tuning_saving.title: Tuning: Saving target
tuning_saving.description: Set saving-mode target behavior for warm and cold conditions.

data_description.heatpump_setpoint: Base heat pump setpoint used when saving mode is active in colder conditions.
data_description.saving_cold_offset_c: Degrees subtracted from heatpump setpoint when computing saving target.
data_description.virtual_temperature: Fallback saving target used during warm outdoor conditions.
data_description.energy_saving_warm_shutdown_outdoor: Outdoor temperature threshold where saving target switches to virtual temperature.

tuning_comfort.title: Tuning: Comfort target
tuning_comfort.description: Set comfort, storage, and maintenance target behavior.

data_description.comfort_target_c: Desired comfort-room temperature before offsets and boost are applied.
data_description.comfort_to_heatpump_offset_c: Degrees subtracted from comfort target to derive heat pump comfort target.
data_description.storage_target_c: Desired storage temperature target before offsets and boost are applied.
data_description.storage_to_heatpump_offset_c: Degrees subtracted from storage target to derive heat pump storage target.
data_description.maintenance_target_c: Fallback target used when comfort is satisfied and storage does not need heat.
data_description.comfort_margin_c: Allowed margin below targets before comfort and storage are treated as unmet.

data_description.cold_threshold: Outdoor temperature below which cold-weather boost starts applying.
data_description.max_boost: Maximum additional boost degrees that can be added in cold weather.
data_description.boost_slope_c: Slope controlling how fast boost increases as outdoor temperature drops.

tuning_limits.title: Tuning: Limits and deadbands
tuning_limits.description: Set control clamp limits and helper/control write deadbands.

data_description.control_min_c: Lower clamp limit for all computed control targets.
data_description.control_max_c: Upper clamp limit for all computed control targets.
data_description.saving_helper_write_delta_c: Minimum target delta required before updating internal saving target state.
data_description.comfort_helper_write_delta_c: Minimum target delta required before updating internal comfort target state.
data_description.final_helper_write_delta_c: Minimum target delta required before updating internal final target state.
data_description.control_write_delta_c: Minimum delta required before writing a new value to the external control number entity.

tuning_daikin.title: Tuning: Daikin consumer
tuning_daikin.description: Set optional Daikin consumer temperatures and write threshold.

data_description.daikin_normal_temperature: Daikin target temperature when policy is OFF (comfort mode).
data_description.daikin_saving_temperature: Daikin target temperature when policy is ON (saving mode).
data_description.daikin_outdoor_temp_threshold: Outdoor guard threshold; Daikin writes are blocked below this temperature.
data_description.daikin_min_temp_change: Minimum delta required before sending a new Daikin setpoint.

error.invalid_required_entities: Required entity id values cannot be empty.
error.invalid_control_range: Control minimum must be less than or equal to control maximum.
error.invalid_boost_slope: Cold boost slope must be greater than zero.
error.invalid_non_negative: Intervals and deltas must be non-negative.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Blockheat config entry is supported.
